name: LOINC_search_tests
description: Search LOINC (Logical Observation Identifiers Names and Codes) lab tests and clinical observations by name or keywords. Returns standardized codes for laboratory tests, vital signs, and clinical measurements. Essential for standardizing lab test names across healthcare systems and research studies.

terms.description: Search terms for lab tests or observations (e.g., 'cholesterol', 'blood glucose', 'hemoglobin', 'creatinine'). Can include test names, components, or abbreviations.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20, max: 500)

exclude_copyrighted.description: Exclude items with external copyright notices (default: true)

label: LOINC
laboratory
clinical
observation
lab test
standardization
medical code
NIH
NLM

name: LOINC_get_code_details
description: Get detailed information for a specific LOINC code including full name, component, property, system, scale, method, and clinical classification. Use this to understand the precise meaning and context of a LOINC code obtained from lab results or clinical data.

loinc_code.description: LOINC code identifier (e.g., '2093-3' for Cholesterol in Serum/Plasma, '4548-4' for Hemoglobin A1c, '8867-4' for Heart rate). The code should be in standard LOINC format with hyphen.

label: LOINC
laboratory
clinical
code details
observation
medical terminology
standardization

name: LOINC_get_answer_list
description: Search LOINC answer-type codes matching a LOINC code or search term. Returns LOINC codes classified as answer-type items (categorical/coded result values used in clinical assessments). Use to find standardized answer codes for clinical observations.

loinc_code.description: LOINC code or search term to find answer-type codes (e.g., '883-9' for ABO blood group answers, '11502-2' for laboratory report codes, 'ABO' or 'blood type' for broader search).

label: LOINC
answer list
coded values

name: LOINC_search_forms
description: Search LOINC clinical forms and survey instruments such as standardized questionnaires and assessment tools. Examples include PHQ-9 (depression), GAD-7 (anxiety), MMSE (cognitive), pain scales, and other validated clinical assessment instruments. Returns LOINC codes for complete forms that can be used in electronic health records.

terms.description: Search terms for clinical forms or survey instruments (e.g., 'PHQ-9', 'depression screening', 'GAD-7', 'anxiety', 'pain scale', 'MMSE', 'cognitive assessment'). Use specific form names or general assessment types.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 20, max: 200)
